calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2012 Off Calendar

Mtn For Default Prove-Up Hrg
Off Calendar Sep-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ksenia Tsenin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sarah Lerschen #6213.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff FIA Card Services, N.A.,
Plaintiff's equest for waiver of live testimony was granted.

No appearance by defaulted defendant Adlan Ozsoy.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages $26,649.41
Costs $624.50 for a total judgment in the amount of $27,273.91
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2012 Continued To Jan-02-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2012 Continued To Sep-05-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
